title: Ex3o's VR Modpack
description: Ryan Cliffords VR Experience but fixed!  2025! All the mods from his video should now work with no problems :) only thing missing is the physics mod since you have to pay for it! enjoy!
body:
Originally created by Ryan Clifford, this modpack brought an immersive VR experience to Minecraft back in 2023. Over time, some features broke due to mod updates and compatibility issues.
I've updated and fixed the pack to restore the intended experience while keeping true to the vanilla Minecraft experience :) 
Credits:
All original credit goes to Ryan Clifford for creating the modpack. I simply repaired and updated it for modern use.

What's fixed:

Updated broken mods

Replaced deprecated or missing dependencies

Tweaked configs for better VR stability
I would recommend adding Sildur's Vibrant Shaders as well! Lite has worked the best for performance while still looking good!

Here are the links to the original mods pages for those that required it:

Falling leaves: https://modrinth.com/mod/fallingleaves

Illuminations: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/illuminations

Effective: https://modrinth.com/mod/effective
